notes: Provisional reference point, NOT the production verifier. Recorded from a free OpenRouter model on a 30-example SciFact dev sample (seed 7) to prove the harness produces real numbers end-to-end. Observed: recall 0.857, precision 0.667, f1 0.750, accuracy 0.733, error_rate 0.0. Floors are set well below observed because n=30 gives wide confidence intervals and free endpoints are flaky. report_only for the same reasons - do not wire a per-PR gate to a shared free endpoint (it 429s under load). To promote: run a larger sample (200+) on a stable endpoint, tighten the floors, and flip to enforce. The production gpt-4o-mini baseline (semantic-verifier.json) remains unmeasured.
